ApiKit.Generators.FacadeGenerator 1.0.0+164ab2850cc21aa61a9dbf153d4ef326f7d8cad7
Copyright (C) 2026 Asseco South Eastern Europe

  -i, --input             Required. Path to input file containing YAML or JSON
                          API specification.

  -o, --output            Path to the output directory in which generated code
                          should be placed.

  -n, --namespace         Base name of namespace in which generated code should
                          be placed.

  -p, --nuget-packages    Path to the JSON file containing list of nuget
                          packages that need to be included in generated
                          projects.

  -y, --yaml              Output resulting API definition with all external
                          references replaced with referenced objects in YAML
                          format.

  -j, --json              Output resulting API definition with all external
                          references replaced with referenced objects in JSON
                          format.

  -d, --dir               This parameter indicates that input is not file but
                          directory.

  -u, --update            Updates previously generated code without replacing
                          solution structure, or removing manually added files.

  -t, --tags              List of tags which indicate what schemas should be
                          generated.

  -m, --merge-tags        With this parameter provider, generator will not split
                          API operations by defined tags.

  --oracle-package        Version of Oracle package to be used in generated
                          Oracle service implementations.

  --appsettings           Path to JSON file which should be used as
                          appsettings.json in resulting solution.

  --problems-markdown     Path to markdown file which contains descriptions of
                          API problems which can occur on generated API.

  --no-auth               If this parameter is provided, API controllers will be
                          generated without requirement for authentication.

  -l, --legacy            Enables legacy API support.

  --sp-array-xml          Speficies whether array parameters for stored
                          procedures should be serialized to XML form.

  --help                  Display this help screen.

  --version               Display version information.

options.description: Path to input file containing YAML or JSON API specification.
Path to JSON file which should be used as appsettings.json in resulting solution.
This parameter indicates that input is not file but directory.
Output resulting API definition with all external references replaced with referenced objects in JSON format.
With this parameter provider, generator will not split API operations by defined tags.
Base name of namespace in which generated code should be placed.
If this parameter is provided, API controllers will be generated without requirement for authentication.
